texto: Racism, Dr. Sam. I worry for my kids about racism. Racism doesn't appear to take holidays or time off. What can I do about this stuff?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Allan Dare Pearce que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Racism, Dr. Sam. I worry for my kids about racism. Racism doesn't appear to take holidays or time…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, children, kids, com foco em kids e racism.

texto: Are we praying?" "If you have to ask, you probably aren't.
